creator: pascal.guitierrez@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #2)

Thanks for your reply, i can still exceed arc_max even if setting via loader.conf

last pid: 62730;  load averages:  6.28,  8.93,  6.72                                                                 up 0+00:18:59  12:47:25
539 processes: 2 running, 537 sleeping
CPU:  0.2% user,  0.0% nice, 14.6% system,  0.1% interrupt, 85.2% idle
Mem: 6756K Active, 676K Inact, 840K Laundry, 15G Wired, 9604K Free
ARC: 14G Total, 657M MFU, 13G MRU, 36M Header, 2628K Other
     14G Compressed, 14G Uncompressed, 1.01:1 Ratio

Even if the machine had swap, it's still way exceeding the arc_max, surely this is a problem?

Did you try the iozone commands I used?
